# podcast-rss-generator

Go module: `github.com/hbmartin/podcast-rss-generator/v2`

This repository provides package `podcast`, a Go library for generating RSS 2.0
podcast feeds with common Apple Podcasts tags.

## Key Files

- `podcast.go`: channel/feed type, item validation, XML encoding, public errors.
- `item.go`: episode/item type and item-level helper methods.
- `itunes.go`: Apple Podcasts tag helper types.
- `podcastindex.go`: Podcasting 2.0 (podcast namespace) tag types and setters.
- `description.go`: CDATA-aware description encoding.
- `example_test.go` and `examples_test.go`: executable public API examples.
- `fuzz_test.go`: native Go fuzz target for feed encoding.
- `mise.toml`: local task definitions for formatting, linting, testing, and docs.

## Common Commands

```sh
mise run fmt
mise run lint
mise run test
mise run readme
mise run fuzz-smoke
```

## Notes For Agents

- Keep the exported API stable unless the user explicitly asks for a breaking
  change.
- Add tests for code changes and new behavior.
- Regenerate `README.md` after changing package docs or public examples.
- Do not rely on `vendor/`; dependencies are resolved through Go modules.
